title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull and run Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list and delete models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client and browser-friendly SDK for Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: Ollama WebUI
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React/Flask) that talks to any local Ollama model; supports RAG, PDF, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client library providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Cookbook showing how to plug Ollama models into Chainlit for rapid conversational AI prototypes.

title: private-gpt with Ollama
summary: Pull-request adding Ollama backend support to PrivateGPT, enabling fully private RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: Branch of GPT4All-UI that adds Ollama as a model backend, giving a Qt-based desktop chat interface.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose files for running Ollama server containerised with GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with auto-scaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal example repo showing Retrieval-Augmented Generation using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client written in Go that supports markdown, conversation history, and multi-model sessions.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Native n8n node that lets workflow automations call any local Ollama model via simple UI fields.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Unofficial Elixir wrapper using Finch HTTP client for chatting and generating with Ollama.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Another Rust crate focused on ergonomic async APIs and built-in Tokio runtime for Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# .NET client with async streaming and dependency-injection friendly design.
